checklist.label: Study for 90 min — no phone on the desk

turns.content: Hey — you committed to studying for 2 hours last night. Did you follow through?
mostly. got like 90 minutes in then lost focus
Okay. Before we talk about what went well — what actually got in the way? Not the surface reason.
kept checking my phone. like every 20 minutes
And why didn't you just put it in another room?
honestly I didn't even think about it. I just let it sit there
That's the real blocker — not the phone, the default. Okay, what actually went well today?
got through the hardest lecture and didn't quit early for once
That's real. Two hours avoided for weeks — and today you didn't quit. What's your minimum commitment for tomorrow?
90 minutes, phone in the other room before I even sit down
Good. Stretch goal if you're locked in?
review my lecture notes before bed
That's the version of you that finishes strong. You already know what to do — tonight you're making sure tomorrow you actually do it. 🔥
